tools.name: search_prompts
tools.description: Search agentic trading prompts by keyword, category, or tag. Returns matching prompts with ID, title, use case and direct URL.

tools.name: get_prompt
tools.description: Get the full details of a single prompt by its ID, including the complete prompt text, use case, how it works, tags and prerequisites.

tools.name: list_categories
tools.description: List all 15 prompt categories with their prompt counts.

tools.name: get_prompts_by_category
tools.description: Get prompts in a specific category.
